content.text:
*(small silence)*

Weird. It felt... a little exposing. Which is strange because I've been in therapy, I've said vulnerable things before, I know how to do that.

But that one came out sideways. I wasn't building up to it.

*(another pause, less performative than the earlier ones)*

And then immediately I wanted to contextualize it, put it in a framework, make it less — I don't know. Less naked.

*(very quietly)*

It's kind of tender, actually. That part. The idea that I've been... protecting something. Even if the protection is brutal.

*(then, almost to herself)*

God, and now the voice has an opinion about the fact that I just said "tender." Very on brand.
